title: Reduced Invincibility Frames
description: RIF stands for 'Reduced Invincibility Frames.' The purpose of this mod is to reduce iFrame duration or disable it.
body:
# No longer maintain the code and it not need anymore since it can done with tags key.. it no need to touch code anymore...

RIF is one of penomior module, mod about **Immune Frame**.

## the main goal of this mod
To separate the Immune Frame part out of penomior and make it more easy to update into newer version of minecraft and light weight

What's this mod?
1. Reduce the minecraft Iframe make it like old Combat
2. Have a falloff Damage if attack too fast the damage gonna reduce 20% , 40% , 60% and maximum at 80% that don't mean dps is the most op but the main is your attack tempo, play minecraft like rythme game maybe it'll help you output more damage than spam 😊😉

## Setup

This mod can work with ServerSide and ClientSide
If you play on the server Both you and Server need to install this mod

## Mod Requirement
- Cloth Config (for setting)
- ModMenu (for setting)
- Fabric api (need)

## Setting Option
due to I spot the problem on penomior that player with barehand can beat full netherrite with mouse marco so I decide to ~~nerd~~ add attack fallout that if you attack too fast the damage will reduce overtime

### hover mouse over it have a description!

## FAQ
**Q: Can I port this mod to (X) loader?**

**A: No.**

**Q: Can you  backport to version 1.x?**

**A: No.** I mod this mod to play with my friend and no reason that good to port back,and I'll update to future version when I want, and I mod like hobby with very limited time

**Q: Can you add this 'xxx' thing**

**A: Depend** depend on my mod that use this one code.

**Q: Can I include this mod in to a modpack?**

**A: Yes.**Go ahead,Please provide credit Modrinth project page.
